Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Worldslayer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Sola possesses the Worldslayer in her inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Worldslayer is an item Sola considers summoning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — The Worldslayer is an Aethertech weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Worldslayer is a gun that shines in the Aether like a deadly star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Worldslayer is a weapon that can project a bridge to annihilate space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Sola retrieves the Worldslayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Worldslayer is a weapon that Sola reached for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Worldslayer is an item that Sola put away.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Worldslayer left a scarlet-edged wound in Starhammer's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Using Worldslayer risks the destruction of the user and others on the colony.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Worldslayer is a masterwork Aethertech on par with a world-level enchanted device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Worldslayer fires a knife-sharp beam.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Worldslayer was used by Sola to shoot Sel’miroth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Worldslayer is a gun consisting of a collection of crimson razors.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The Worldslayer is a replicated version of Sola's greatest weapon created by Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — A direct strike from Worldslayer weakened the enemy and caused a global disaster for Zykaros.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
